questions.question: In `save_po`, how is the `item_id` value for each line item extracted from the form submission data?

options.text: Directly from `$_POST['item_id']` as a plain integer
Via `str_replace('pid-', '', $lineitem['sku'])` — stripping the `pid-` prefix
Via `explode('-', $lineitem['sku'])[1]` — splitting on hyphen and taking the second part
Via `intval($lineitem['sku'])` — casting the entire SKU string to integer

questions.question: When `save_po` creates a PO with `$_POST['type'] == 'create'` (not draft), what status is assigned to the PO items in `TBL_PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS`?

options.text: `'created'`
`'draft'`
`'ordered'`
`'active'`

questions.question: In `save_po`, when updating an existing PO (non-split mode with `$_POST['po_id']` set), how are PO items handled before inserting updated items?

options.text: Each existing item is updated individually via a WHERE clause matching `poi_id`
All existing items for the PO are deleted, then new items are inserted via `insertMulti`
Items are upserted via `INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE`
Only changed items are updated; new items are appended to the existing set

questions.question: In `save_po` split mode, what happens to an item in the original PO when the quantity difference (`oldQty - splitQty`) equals zero?

options.text: The item remains in the original PO with `item_qty = 0`
The item is deleted from `TBL_PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS` for the original PO
The split operation is rejected and an error is returned
The item is transferred to the new PO and marked as `'split_complete'`

questions.question: In `delete_po`, what condition is evaluated against the `COUNT(*)` result from `TBL_PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS_LOT` before allowing PO deletion?

options.text: `$count == 0` — ensures no lot items are assigned to the PO
`$count < 0` — a condition that is always false since `COUNT(*)` returns values ≥ 0
`$count > 0` — blocks deletion when lot items exist for the PO
`empty($count)` — checks for a null or zero count result

questions.question: What determines whether a new lot is inserted into `TBL_PURCHASE_LOT` versus `TBL_PURCHASE_LOT_LOCAL` in the `add_lot` action?

options.text: The `lot_number` prefix — `'SF'` routes to international, `'LP'` routes to local
The `lot_carriageType` value — `'percentage'` for international, `'fixed'` for local
The `$_POST['is_local']` flag — if set and truthy, the local table is used
The carrier's `party_type` field from `TBL_PARTIES`

questions.question: In `packing_list_new.php`, what are the lot code prefixes and zero-padding formats for international and local lots?

options.text: Both types use `'LOT'` prefix with a 4-digit zero-padded sequence number
International: `'SF'` with 2-digit zero-padding, Local: `'LP'` with 4-digit zero-padding
International: `'INT'` with 6-digit zero-padding, Local: `'DOM'` with 6-digit zero-padding
International: `'PL'` with 3-digit zero-padding, Local: `'LPL'` with 3-digit zero-padding

questions.question: What status value is assigned to items in `TBL_PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS_LOT` when a packing list is saved via `add_pl_items`?

options.text: `'created'`
`'packed'`
`'rts'`
`'pending_shipment'`

questions.question: In `get_po_items`, how is the available quantity per product calculated for packing list selection?

options.text: `item_qty` — the full ordered quantity
`item_qty - item_shipped_qty` — ordered minus already shipped
`item_qty - item_received_qty - item_shipped_qty` — ordered minus received and shipped
`item_qty - item_received_qty` — ordered minus already received

questions.question: In `save_grn`, what database operation pattern distinguishes it from all other Purchase module actions?

options.text: It uses `$db->rawQuery()` for complex multi-table SQL statements
It uses `$db->startTransaction()` with `$db->commit()` / `$db->rollback()`
It uses `$db->insertMulti()` for batch item insertion
It uses `$db->subQuery()` for nested query operations

questions.question: What external service call within `update_on_grn_creation()` creates inventory rows from GRN data?

options.text: `$db->insert(TBL_INVENTORY, $inventoryItems)` — direct database insertion
`$inventory->create_from_grn($grn_id)` — Inventory class method call
`$stockist->new_grn_inbound($grn_id, $lineItems, $lot_details)` — Stockist singleton method
`Inventory::inboundFromGRN($grn_id, $lot_id)` — static Inventory class method

questions.question: When a GRN is created with `'created'` status in `save_grn`, what task is auto-generated?

options.text: A `'quality_check'` task assigned to the QC team with the lot ID
A `'tagging'` task assigned to `'administrator'` with parameter `array('grnId' => 'GRN_' . $grn_id)`
A `'warehouse_receive'` task assigned to warehouse staff with the GRN line items
An `'inventory_audit'` task assigned to the inventory team with the lot number

questions.question: In `save_grn`, when `lot_carriage_type` equals `'fixed'`, what transformation is applied to `lot_carriage_value` before passing it to inventory creation?

options.text: It remains unchanged — `'fixed'` indicates a flat rate per shipment
It is divided by `total_qty` to calculate per-unit carriage cost
It is multiplied by the exchange rate (`lot_ex`) for currency conversion
It is divided by the number of unique SKUs in the GRN

questions.question: In `save_grn`, what party-related data is fetched from `TBL_PARTIES` and injected into `lot_details` before calling `update_on_grn_creation()`?

options.text: `party_name` and `party_address` for shipping documentation
`party_ams` and `party_firm_id` for inventory context
`party_gstin` and `party_state` for tax calculation
`party_type` and `party_currency` for payment processing

questions.question: In `mark_lot_shipped`, how many entity levels receive cascading status updates?

options.text: 2 levels — LOT and PO
3 levels — LOT, Purchase Order Items Lot (POIL), and PO
4 levels — LOT, POIL, POI (Purchase Order Items), and PO
5 levels — LOT, POIL, POI, PO, and PARTY

questions.question: In `mark_lot_shipped`, what determines whether a PO item (`TBL_PURCHASE_ORDER_ITEMS`) gets status `'shipped'` vs `'partial_shipped'`?

options.text: Whether the lot contains all items from that PO
Whether the SUM of `item_shipped_qty` (across POIL where `item_status='shipped'`) is ≥ `item_qty`
Whether the PO has only one active lot assigned
Whether all items in the lot belong to the same PO

questions.question: In `update_on_grn_creation()`, what determines whether a PO gets final status `'received'` vs `'partial_shipped_received'`?

options.text: Whether total `item_received_qty` matches total `item_qty` across all PO items
Whether no items with `'shipped'` or `'partial_shipped'` status remain in the PO's items
Whether the lot status has been successfully updated to `'received'`
Whether the GRN `grn_total_qty` matches the lot's total shipped quantity

questions.question: In `grn_report`, how does the action identify inventory items that belong to a specific lot?

options.text: Joins `TBL_INVENTORY` with `TBL_PURCHASE_GRN` via `grn_id` foreign key
Uses `WHERE inv_id LIKE '{lotId}%'` to pattern-match inventory IDs that start with the lot ID
Queries `TBL_PURCHASE_GRN_ITEMS` for `item_id` values, then fetches from `TBL_INVENTORY` by `item_id`
Uses a `lot_id` foreign key column on `TBL_INVENTORY` that directly references the lot table

questions.question: What does the `filterLogs()` helper function remove from inventory log arrays?

options.text: Duplicate log entries with identical `inv_id` and `log_type` values
Sequential pairs where the current entry has `log_type='alteration'` and the next has `log_type='qc_failed'`
All log entries older than the lot's `lot_createdDate`
Log entries with empty or null `log_details` JSON fields

questions.question: Which statement accurately describes the Purchase module's cross-module dependency relationship with Inventory?

options.text: Purchase reads from Inventory for stock validation, but Inventory never reads Purchase data
Purchase creates inventory via `$stockist->new_grn_inbound()`; Inventory reads Purchase GRN and LOT data — forming a circular dependency
Both modules are independent and communicate only through a shared task queue
Purchase depends on Inventory for cost price calculations before creating GRNs
